title: RunBudget — the global ceiling of one /harness-run pass (the bound gate-budget enforces)
description: Persisted at .harness/run/budget.json by lattice.run_budget_start; read by run_budget_exhausted, which gate-budget consults to deny every worker write once the run is spent. This is the highest-blast-radius durable state in the harness — it decides whether every write in the project is allowed — so it is typed and check-gated like the lattice. A vacuous budget (all caps null) is forbidden: a 'budget' that bounds nothing is a misconfiguration, not a run. See bin/run-budget.py and references/agentic-systems-foundations/layer-policy.md.

start_ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (with offset) when the run began. Iterations/cells are counted from the ledger since this instant.

deadline_ts.description: Absolute wall-clock deadline (ISO-8601 with offset), or null for no time limit. Enforced with no counter: gate-budget denies once now >= deadline_ts.

max_iterations.description: Cap on validate events (engine passes) since start_ts, or null. Counted from the ledger, not the orchestrator.

max_cells.description: Cap on distinct cells validated=pass since start_ts, or null.
